title: Biomes Wandering Traders with Fresh Animations
description: New variants of wandering traders!!! Now with fresh animations
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6957f8aa0ddab28ce48a2c430decab7bdba8e0b3.png)
With this texturepack, the wandering traders have diferents aspecks, depends on what biome they are. Now with fresh animations made by FreshLX  Requires OptiFine **or** [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) for Fabric! Game version: 1.21.8 - 1.20.x Use the original pack to view the spectaculars animations by FreshLX:  ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8effdb900b19b4070ee86a11e16703bc564b54f4_0.webp) New wandering traders for a new experience!!! Check my profile for more content ;)
